title: Smart Data models company schema
description: This data model describes a company in a port

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be Company

mrn.description: Property. MRN coded identifier. This URN should Conforms MRN & IETF specifically RFC 2141, RFC 5234, and RFC 8141. The proposed format is  id::='urn:mrn:<PORT>:<ONSS>:community:company:id:[0-9]+' or where PORT := UN/LOCODE of port, OID:= Organisation UN/LOCODE, OONSS:=Organization Name of Service, 9999999 an unique identifier that the creator of the company registry entity will identify on his systems (i.e. a SQL row-id), i.e. urn:mrn:eshuv:community:company:id:1296

legalCode.description: Property. Code of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

registeredName.description: Property. official Name of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

alias.description: Property. Non official Name (nickname) of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

entityType.description: Property. Type of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

email.description: Property. email of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

telephone.description: Property. phone number of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

active.description: Property. Status of activation of the company or entity with activities or responsibility in the port

admissionDate.description: Property. Date in which the company was registered in the model
